product_name: Brielle | Winter Lounge Dress
description: The Brielle | Winter Lounge Dress is made for everything we love about the holiday season — twinkling lights, crackling fireplaces, and those moments when you want to feel warm, confident, and effortlessly stylish. This soft, fluffy knit wraps you in comfort while giving you that elevated, festive look that feels so right for winter. Whether you’re hosting a Christmas dinner, heading to a holiday party, or enjoying a quiet night in with a glass of wine, this is the dress that makes the season feel special. Why You’ll Love It   Ultra-soft winter knit: cozy, warm, and incredibly comfortable — without feeling heavy.   Holiday-ready vibe: the perfect blend of elegance and festive charm.   Flattering V-neck & button-side detail: adds a feminine and polished touch.   Perfect for every winter moment: Christmas brunch, gift-wrapping nights, New Year’s get-togethers.   Comfort meets style: feels like your favorite loungewear, looks like high-end holiday fashion. The maxi length and full, floaty skirt with godet panels create a flowy and elegant look, while the open, lace up back adds a touch of unexpected playfulness.   Colour: Ivory. Maxi length. Floral burnout fabric. Fully lined. Cowl neck. Lace up back. Full skirt with godets.
